Description: Pear Therapeutics Inc is a commercial-stage healthcare company pioneering a new class of software-based medicines, sometimes referred to as Prescription Digital Therapeutics (PDTs), which use software to treat diseases directly. The company's vision is to advance healthcare through the widespread use of PDTs and to be the one-stop shop for PDTs offered by Pear and other organizations that may choose to make their products available to patients, providers, and payors via its commercial platform, known as PearConnect.
